news.title: Yoga over Python: how India’s new college curriculum rewards the easiest skills
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the structural shift in India's higher education policy and its impact on the future workforce's skill sets.
news.why_it_matters: Explains how credit-based systems might inadvertently incentivize students to pick easier subjects, potentially diluting the quality of India's tech talent pool.

news.title: IT firms rethink billing as artificial intelligence reshapes work
news.india_relevance: Directly impacts India's $250B+ IT sector which is transitioning from man-hour billing to outcome-based models.
news.why_it_matters: The shift from 'time and material' to AI-driven efficiency threatens the traditional linear growth model of Indian tech giants.

news.title: India's young workforce is growing and getting more educated: State of Working India 2026 report
news.india_relevance: Provides a macro-economic snapshot of India's most critical asset—its demographic dividend.
news.why_it_matters: Highlights a structural improvement in labor quality, which is a prerequisite for India's transition to a high-middle-income economy.

news.title: Viksit Bharat and net-zero as goals demand that India sets up a specialized transition finance institution
news.india_relevance: Proposes a new structural financial framework to fund India's massive green energy transition.
news.why_it_matters: Standard commercial banks are ill-equipped for long-gestation climate projects; a specialized DFI could bridge the multi-trillion dollar funding gap.

news.title: From Aluminium To Alphonso Mangoes: West Asia Tensions Are Paralysing India’s Export Engines
news.india_relevance: Connects geopolitical conflict in the Middle East to specific sectoral pain points for Indian exporters.
news.why_it_matters: Illustrates the second-order effects of maritime insecurity on high-value Indian perishables and industrial commodities.

news.title: Energy security versus myopia: India’s LPG scarcity highlights the need for robust central planning
news.india_relevance: Critiques India's energy logistics and the vulnerability of its domestic fuel supply chain.
news.why_it_matters: Argues that tactical fixes for LPG shortages are insufficient without a long-term structural overhaul of energy storage and procurement.

news.title: How Iran war could impact India's external trade, balance of payments, and rupee
news.india_relevance: Examines the mechanism through which regional conflict translates into domestic fiscal and currency pressure.
news.why_it_matters: Explains the cause-effect chain between oil price spikes, the widening Current Account Deficit, and the weakening Rupee.

news.title: MSMEs to account for nearly half of India's e-commerce growth by 2030: McKinsey
news.india_relevance: Forecasts a major structural shift in how small businesses in India will access markets.
news.why_it_matters: Digitization of MSMEs is a key pillar for job creation and formalization of the Indian economy over the next decade.

news.title: IndiGo in turbulent times as CEO quits after operational meltdown
news.india_relevance: Focuses on the leadership and operational stability of India's largest airline.
news.why_it_matters: Governance and operational failures at a dominant market player can disrupt national connectivity and aviation sector valuations.

news.title: Why do ships move slowly?
news.india_relevance: Explains the economics of global shipping which dictates the cost of Indian imports and exports.
news.why_it_matters: Uses the current maritime crisis to explain 'slow steaming' and how shipping speeds impact global inflation and Indian port efficiency.

news.title: IRDAI shifts to perpetual registration for intermediaries, scraps 3-year renewal cycle
news.india_relevance: A significant ease-of-doing-business policy change for India's insurance distribution sector.
news.why_it_matters: Reduces compliance overhead for thousands of agents and brokers, potentially accelerating insurance penetration in India.

news.title: Data centre boom brightens engineering job prospects—100,000 new jobs likely
news.india_relevance: Identifies a specific high-growth niche in the Indian labor market driven by global tech trends.
news.why_it_matters: As India becomes a global hub for data storage, the demand for specialized civil and electrical engineering is diverging from traditional IT roles.

news.title: RBI seeks banks’ views on AI-based facial recognition tools at ATMs, branches to curb fraud
news.india_relevance: A major policy move by the central bank to integrate advanced tech into India's banking security.
news.why_it_matters: Balances financial inclusion with security, but raises significant questions about privacy and technical implementation across rural India.

news.title: India underreported rice, wheat price support: US, others to WTO
news.india_relevance: A critical trade policy issue that affects India's agricultural subsidies and international trade relations.
news.why_it_matters: WTO disputes over Minimum Support Price (MSP) could force India to rethink its domestic food security and farmer support mechanisms.

news.title: The great edtech consolidation begins

news.title: Atomberg’s next spin as it prepares for IPO: From selling fans to supplying components

news.india_relevance: A structural indicator of the health and liquidity of the Indian banking system.
